question:
Will Newcastle United Jets FC vs. Melbourne Victory FC end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for October 24, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.a-league.com.au/

evidences.title: Victory Men on their travels to face Jets | Melbourne Victory
evidences.content: Home News # Victory Men on their travels to face Jets Melbourne Victory 23 October, 2025 ## Share ### Share this link via ### Share this: ### Or Copy Link Melbourne Victory visit Newcastle Jets in Round 2 of the Isuzu UTE A-League on Friday, October 24, kick-off 7.35pm AEDT. Our first away trip of 2025/26 will be the 56th meeting in the competition between Victory and the Jets, with the first, just over 20 years ago, delivering the Club’s maiden three points courtesy of an Archie Thompson goal. Another maximum will be the target for Arthur Diles’ side at McDonald Jones Stadium, as they look to build on their draw against Auckland FC against a Newcastle outfit who suffered an opening round loss to their New South Wales neighbours, Central Coast Mariners. ### The Boys in Blue [...] Round 2 Squad: 2. Jason DAVIDSON, 3. Adama TRAORE, 4. Lachlan JACKSON, 8. Jordi VALADON, 9. Nikolaos VERGOS, 10. Denis GENREAU, 11. Clerismario SANTOS RODRIGUES, 14. Matthew GRIMALDI, 15. Sebastian ESPOSITO, 16. evidences.title: Jets Vs. Victory: A-League Showdown Analysis
evidences.content: Melbourne Victory is known for its tactical flexibility and ability to adapt. Their formations vary, but they often use a 4-3-3 or a 4-2-3-1 formation, which gives them balance in both attack and defense. They often opt for a possession-based game style, seeking to control the ball. They aim to dictate the tempo of the match. They use quick, precise passing to move the ball into the attacking areas, creating scoring opportunities. They have many players capable of unlocking defenses. They have creative midfielders and clinical finishers. When defending, Victory typically adopts a high-pressing approach. This involves aggressively winning the ball back. They will deny the opponent time and space in their own half. The team is known for its organization and discipline. They make it tough [...] ### Melbourne Victory Tactical Approach [...] The Newcastle Jets’ tactical approach is often determined by their coach’s philosophy and the strengths of the players. Their formation varies, but they often favor a 4-3-3 or a 4-2-3-1 formation. This allows them to balance defense and attack. In recent times, the team has shown a greater emphasis on building attacks from the back, focusing on c...

evidences.title: Preview: Melbourne Victory v Newcastle Jets - A-Leagues
evidences.content: Past five matches: Victory: DWLLW Jets: LWWWD The Game: Sunday marks the 1,000th game in A-League history. The Melbourne Victory go into the clash on the back of a two-game unbeaten run, while the Newcastle Jets were beaten for the first time in seven last time out. Kevin Muscat’s Victory are aiming for their third clean sheet in a row, which would be the first time they have achieved that feat since February 2011. The Victory have won five of their past six home games against the Jets and go in as favourites. Newcastle will enjoy counter-attacking against a Victory side who will look to keep possession. The Jets have the lowest passing accuracy in the league but are capable of scoring goals through Adam Taggart and Emile Heskey. [...] The game breaker: James Troisi – the talented attacking midfielder has been at the centre of much of the Victory’s better play this season. With five goals and an assist, Troisi continues to stake his claim for a Socceroos place. His combination with Mitch Nichols shapes as being crucial for Muscat’s team as the campaign goes on. If Troisi and Nichols are allowed to find space in the attacking third, the Jets will find it hard to contain the Victo...
